description_long: This house features a complex, multi-gabled roof with steep pitches and intersecting sections, giving it a stately and traditional appearance. The exterior is predominantly light-colored, with large rectangular windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns across the facade. A covered porch with columns marks the main entryway, while arched openings and a garage are visible on the side. Two prominent chimneys rise along the rear and side elevations, suggesting multiple fireplaces inside. The house sits on a neatly manicured green lawn, and the overall structure is spacious, likely accommodating multiple rooms and living areas. Architectural details such as the porch, arches, and rooflines evoke a blend of Colonial Revival and Craftsman influences.
description: A large, light-colored house with a steep, multi-gabled roof, prominent chimneys, and a covered front porch with columns. The exterior features a mix of rectangular and arched windows, set on a manicured green lawn.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entryway with a covered porch, columns, and large windows, highlighting the steep gabled roof.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the garage, an arched side opening, and additional windows, as well as the complex roof structure.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a series of arched openings, a long covered patio or veranda, and more symmetrical window arrangements.
description_view_3: The back and side view features two tall chimneys, multiple windows, and the continuation of the steep rooflines.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with some symmetrical rows and arched openings
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, single main door, and overhanging gable roof
